top_signals.title: Japan Bonds Jump After Katayama’s GPIF Remarks, Strong Auction
top_signals.summary: Japanese government bonds climbed on Tuesday after remarks by Finance Minister Satsuki Katayama boosted sentiment toward sovereign debt, and as a 20-year auction attracted strong investor demand.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: AI is changing older workers' careers, research finds — here's how
top_signals.summary: AI may either prompt some older workers to leave their jobs or help make their roles more efficient, research finds. Here's which careers may be most affected.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Europe Set for Strongest Earnings Growth in Years: Taking Stock
top_signals.summary: The sluggish profit growth that held back European stocks is a thing of the past, with the second-quarter reporting season predicted to show a jump in regional earnings.

top_signals.title: Turkish man dies while in Tokyo police custody
top_signals.summary: The man said he began experiencing abdominal pain on June 29 while in police custody in Tokyo, and he was pronounced dead on July 2, with police not publicly stating the cause.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
